summary.key_theme: 儘管 第 4 季財報優於預期，但由於核心消費者支出疲軟及對未來銷售成長的擔憂，華爾街分析師普遍下調了目標價。

bullish.title: Kohl's Q4 Adj. EPS $1.07 Beats $0.85 Estimate, Sales $5.173B Beat $5.032B Estimate
bullish.reason: 公司第 4 季每股盈餘與營收雙雙優於市場預期，顯示短期營運具備韌性。

bullish.title: Kohl's shares are trading higher after the company reported better-than-expected Q4 financial results and issued FY2026 sales guidance above estimates.
bullish.reason: 財報發布後股價一度上漲，反映市場對優於預期的財測給予正面回應。

bullish.title: Kohl's Sees FY2026 Adj EPS $1.00-$1.60 vs $1.39 Est; Sees Sales $15.216B-$15.527B vs $14.845B Est
bullish.reason: 公司提供的 2026 財年營收指引高於市場預期，為投資人提供了一定程度的信心支撐。

bullish.title: Dow Jumps Over 300 Points; Kohl's Posts Upbeat Earnings
bullish.reason: 整體大盤走勢強勁配合公司財報利多，短期內推升股價表現。

bearish.title: B of A Securities Maintains Underperform on Kohl's, Lowers Price Target to $15
bearish.reason: 大型投行下調目標價至 $15，反映對公司長期獲利能力與競爭地位的擔憂。

bearish.title: Goldman Sachs Maintains Sell on Kohl's, Lowers Price Target to $13
bearish.reason: 高盛維持賣出評級並進一步下調目標價，顯示機構投資人對其基本面轉趨悲觀。

bearish.title: Kohl's CFO Warns Core Shoppers Are Being 'Choiceful'
bearish.reason: 財務長公開警告核心客群消費趨於謹慎，直接點出零售業面臨的宏觀經濟逆風。

bearish.title: Kohl's Posts Q4 Sales Miss, Analyst Cuts Price Target On Delay In Winning Back Consumers
bearish.reason: 儘管整體獲利優於預期，但銷售額未達標且分析師指出爭取消費者回流的進度不如預期。

bearish.title: UBS Maintains Sell on Kohl's, Raises Price Target to $8
bearish.reason: 雖小幅上調目標價，但維持賣出評級，顯示該機構仍認為股價存在下行風險。

bearish.title: Jefferies Maintains Hold on Kohl's, Lowers Price Target to $15
bearish.reason: 目標價從 $22 大幅下調至 $15，反映分析師對未來成長動能的預期顯著修正。

bearish.title: TD Cowen Maintains Hold on Kohl's, Lowers Price Target to $17
bearish.reason: 目標價從 $23 下調至 $17，顯示市場對公司未來獲利成長的預期正在減弱。

bearish.title: Kohl's Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Comparable Sales Dip 2.8% Y/Y
bearish.reason: 同店銷售額下滑 2.8%，顯示核心零售業務仍面臨結構性挑戰。

neutral.title: More 'Fun,' Fewer Choices, and Stuff Under $10: How Kohl's Is Trying to Win Back Shoppers
neutral.reason: 報導公司轉型策略，屬於中性觀察，尚未見到具體成效。

neutral.title: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Kohl's, Lowers Price Target to $18
neutral.reason: 維持中性評級，僅因應市場環境調整目標價。

neutral.title: Telsey Advisory Group Maintains Market Perform on Kohl's, Lowers Price Target to $17
neutral.reason: 維持市場表現評級，反映分析師對該股持觀望態度。

neutral.title: Baird Maintains Neutral on Kohl's, Lowers Price Target to $20
neutral.reason: 維持中性評級，目標價下調幅度相對較小。

neutral.title: These Analysts Cut Their Forecasts On Kohl's Following Q4 Earnings
neutral.reason: 彙整分析師調整預測的報導，屬於市場資訊總結。

neutral.title: Kohl's Q4 Earnings Report: What Investors Need to Know
neutral.reason: 財報發布前的資訊整理，不具備方向性影響。

neutral.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Kohl's Stock Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
neutral.reason: 關於股息收益的投資策略分析，與公司營運基本面無直接關聯。
